name: IDS/IPS Alert Triage
description: Triages IDS/IPS alerts by enriching source and destination indicators, then applying Riggs AI analysis to determine true positive versus false positive. High-severity confirmed threats are escalated with approval for containment actions including firewall blocking and SOC notification. Medium-severity alerts are routed to the SOC queue for manual review. Low-severity or false positive alerts are tuned out and closed with documentation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Enrich source and destination IPs with reputation data

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Block confirmed threat sources at the network perimeter

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify SOC analysts of high-severity confirmed threats

config.description: Triggers on any IDS/IPS alert from Snort, Suricata, or similar network intrusion detection systems

config.additional_instructions: Enrich source and destination IPs via threat intel. Analyze the IDS signature, payload context, and traffic patterns. Classify as true positive, false positive, or inconclusive. Assess severity impact.
config.description: AI-powered enrichment and classification of the IDS/IPS alert to determine true/false positive status and severity assessment
Routes high-severity confirmed threats to the containment path, everything else to annotation/review
Requires SOC analyst approval before blocking the threat source to prevent disruption from false positives

parameters.comment: Blocked per IDS alert — Signature: {{trigger_1.alert.signature}}, Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}

config.description: Blocks the confirmed threat source IP on the perimeter firewall
Sends notification to the SOC channel confirming the IDS threat has been contained
Routes medium/low alerts to the SOC queue for review or closes false positives with documentation
